title: AMQP 0-9-1 Topology and Routing Models · Language Lens: Routing Key Binding Match
summary: A Go 1.26 service team must encode exchanges, bindings, routing keys, and zero-to-many destinations as deterministic Go values; reviewers reject hidden goroutine ownership, unbounded work, stale channel state, and claims that stop at a nil client error. steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Predict Routing Key Binding Match · Theory Routing Key Binding Match
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go messaging team handles case 2534 during quorum failover exercise during a rolling broker restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to derive zero, one, or many queue destinations from AMQP exchange and binding values; retain rollback topology before deleting old bindings; then exhaust retry age before attempts reach their maximum.
